name: Quanta Storage Inc.
summary: Quanta Storage Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells optical storage products to computer manufacturers worldwide. The company offers storage and peripheral products, such as NAS, DAS, USB-C power delivery and mini docks, adapters, and Wi-Fi storage products. It also provides solid state drives and intelligent automation systems; and storage manufacturing services of storage devices and systems, computer peripherals, and IoT related products. In addition, the company offers project planning, product development, technical, design, engineering mechanism, electrical engineering, logistics management, and repair and maintenance services. Quanta Storage Inc. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.
